one_time_description: Correction of error: incorrect consolidation of Community Trust Fund cash and investments as at April 1, 2020, resulting in decrease to accumulated surplus of $6,927,524
economic_notes: Agreements with Goldcorp Inc. (0.5% variable + $450,000 annually from Red Lake Gold Mine), Rubicon Minerals Corp (1% of exploration expenditures up to $250,000 annually), Pure Gold Mining Inc. (1% of exploration expenditures plus capacity/education payments), Great Bear Resources Ltd. and Lac Seul First Nation (50,000 common shares received plus quarterly drilling payments). Kinross Gold Corporation revenue $775,156. TLE Specific Claims Loan outstanding.
notes: Audit is qualified due to omission of budget comparison information required by PSAS — not a qualification on financial position per se. Fiscal year is 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Auditor signature shows 'Chartered Professional Accountants' with no firm name explicitly stated; audit report dated April 29, 2025 (very late). Correction of error in prior years: Community Trust Fund incorrectly consolidated, restating accumulated surplus down by $6,927,524. No remuneration schedule included. Expenses_enterprises includes Economic Development ($885,121) + Ontario First Nation LP ($2). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($3,891,533) + Province of Ontario ($490,226) = $4,381,759; OSR = $7,517,092 - $4,381,759 = $3,135,333. Long-term debt (TLE Specific Claims Loan) is non-interest bearing with no repayments made in 2022. ISC surplus repayable of $306,128 classified as liability. Investments include Battle North Gold Corporation shares ($555,477) carried at cost.
